message: Jake
Ash
Jennifer
Oh, it's rare to see you here for several days in a row.
That's kind of snide, wasn't it? It wasn't like this a little while ago.
It was like that a little while ago, but it's been pretty quiet lately.
So my perspective has changed too.
Come on, you always say things like that.
Haha.
Sorry. I just wanted to tease you since it's been a while.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Think.
System.
The atmosphere around.
About the filming.
About the serial murder case.
About it.
About the filming.
About the serial murder case.
Save.
Quit the game.
There's no drunken shouts to be heard, and a quiet time is passing. The music feels a bit loud, but it's nice not to hear the voices of the neighboring customers.
It's a safe and slightly boring place without drugs, working girls, or flashy shows.
But for a place that's supposedly a front for shady business, the stock of bottles at the back bar is abundant.
Next to me,
is sitting. It's not particularly cold or inviting. Why is she here?
is staring at me. Other customers
seem to have no idea who
to care about the surroundings right now.
As always, she stands in front of me, carefully listening. She should give that much attention to the other customers too.
The well-defined face illuminated by purple lights is both somewhat dubious and has a kind of sexiness.
As usual, when I arrive, she sticks close like a personal bartender.
It seems I'm a good way to pass the time.
This atmosphere suits her better than being seen in sunlight.
She is an actress known for her many bed scenes.
I can understand why that would be the case.
It's a shame, but Jennifer doesn't quite fit in this bar, which could hardly be called upscale. There are certainly other places to have fun.
She's glaring at me. Given the circumstances, it doesn't just seem like a coincidence.
Could it be that she's inviting me?
You drank quite a bit yesterday, didn't you? Are you okay?
Uh.
Yeah, I haven't drunk in a while, so I'm feeling a bit hungover.
As I thought.
I was indeed concerned. Here, take this; it's medicine that works well for hangovers.
Thank you.
I'm not really a strong drinker to begin with.
Hehe.
I did push you to drink yesterday.
Maybe I should ask if business is tough for this place?
What a joke. Even if that were the case, you can hardly make a profit with just yesterday's crowd.
A woman's voice.
It looks fun; may I sit here?
Welcome.
Oh.
Oh,
Je,
Hello, detective. I didn't think you were the type to drink during the day.
No.
I haven't been drinking. But why?
Please give me your autograph later. I've been a fan for a long time.
Well, thank you.
An autograph is fine.
Thank you very much.
When she took her order, did she think she was being considerate and withdraw inside?
No, maybe she’s looking for something to get signed.
This place is calm and nice.
Ah, that is...
If you tell him, he’ll be happy.
Uh, is it the person from earlier?
Yes, that’s right. He’s the owner of this place.
Wow, he’s an impressive guy for being so young.
Actually, I heard from Yuriko that I’d get to meet you if I came here.
Did she really say that?
Yeah, I asked her a bit at the party. Did I bother you?
It’s not that it’s a bother, but...
Why would you do that?
I just found myself curious about you.
Is that not a good reason?
I was lucky to meet you on my first visit.
I’m lucky too, getting to meet such a famous actress today.
Please, just call me...
without any honorifics. Otherwise, I feel like there’s no point in being here.
W-what do you mean?
What do you mean by 'what do you mean'?
I can’t say it because I’m embarrassed.
I’m happy you called me that.
Uh, um...
Oh wow, is it already this late!? I’m sorry, I don’t want to be late for the shoot.
Oh.
Yeah, being late isn’t good, right?
I’m sorry.
Well, see you again.
She left.
Oh, she really has already left, hasn’t she?
Ahh.
They left behind a mystery.
A mystery, you say?
I'll come back.
Thanks for the meal.
Ah, watch your step!
Whoa!
Crash!
Tripping while sober, huh?
No.
Maybe I’m a little tipsy.
Her behavior was oddly suggestive.
Is it the ambiance of this place that’s so comforting, or is it you?
Aren't you filming today?
Not yet.
Not yet? Is it okay to be here? I mean, don’t you have a lot to prepare?
Hehe, it's fine. We still have time.
Besides, it’s not like I’m the one doing the preparations.
Ah, that’s true.
Yes. I just have to show up.
Last time, I showed a less-than-flattering side of myself.
Last time?
Yeah, I barged in on you chatting with the director.
Oh.
No, it was my fault for being the one to interrupt.
No, I was frustrated because the filming wasn't going as planned.
It's this personality of mine that gets me talked about behind my back.
Do you think this movie will be completed without a hitch?
Yeah. It might be delayed a bit, though.
I see.
That’s true.
I was really happy to be part of this movie. I want it to be finished as soon as possible.
I mentioned it at the party, but I don’t really know much about this incident.
However, I do know that there are people saying I might be the culprit.
That’s just a baseless rumor, though.
But the fact that you asked me this question means you’re concerned about it too, right?
That’s true, I’m sorry.
No, please don’t apologize. I think I have something about me that leads others to misunderstand.
I heard there was a similar murder case in New York.
Yeah, it seems like it happened recently. But I'm not sure if it’s part of the same string of events.
Why?
Why does the criminal mutilate the body?
I don’t know either. Is it a behavior with some meaning, or is it just a hobby?
Either way, it’s chilling. The things humans do to each other.
I just can’t understand the criminal’s mindset.
The reason I came all the way here was to see you, right?
I’m happy, but is that really true?
Why on earth did Yuriko bring up Rain Tree?
I want to know what kind of conversation took place at the party.
Thinking that I’m talking to a famous actress feels like a surreal reality.
She must have come here for some reason, even though she has a shoot coming up.
Why would she come here?
To see me.
No way.
It seems like the shoot's been struggling due to various reasons, so I can understand why she’d be frustrated.
I hope it gets completed safely somehow.
Did she know that she’s being called the culprit in this case?
It was actually Tony who brought this up to me in the first place.
And Tony was the one who said I was the culprit.
If the criminal could just be caught quickly,
one suspicion regarding me would disappear.
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
